Aerial.ref_text: You will not be able to go to the authorities for help, since you will have no witness to testify. It will be for you to affect a rescue, risking the wrath of an old and wealthy family, and possible arrest at the hooves of Equestrian authorities.
Aerial.generated_ref_text: You will not be able to go to the authorities for help, since you will have no witness to testify. It will be for you to affect a rescue, risking the wrath of an old and wealthy family, and possible arrest at the hooves of Equestrian authorities.
Aerial.description: A mature female voice with a smooth, low-register timbre, neutral accent, calculating spy archetype, possessing an analytical and stoic quality. The cadence is measured, deliberate, and highly articulate. Poised and observant with a calm, commanding resonance.

Blake.ref_text: We don't know how long there will be a way back. Have you looked around? We're in a fucking desert. One of us is a fish. How do you think this goes if we get stuck? We aren't gambling with Kaelynn's life.
Blake.generated_ref_text: We don't know how long there will be a way back. Have you looked around? We're in a fucking desert. One of us is a fish. How do you think this goes if we get stuck? We aren't gambling with Kaelynn's life.
Blake.description: A young adult male voice with a steady, grounded pitch, neutral accent, resilient leader archetype, stoic and pragmatic quality. Deliberate and focused cadence. A subtle layer of grit and controlled intensity.

Blake Hodges.ref_text: She was human when we arrived. We planned to be back for her today, to bring her back across. She wanted to see our world the way we were viewing hers.
Blake Hodges.generated_ref_text: She was human when we arrived. We planned to be back for her today, to bring her back across. She wanted to see our world the way we were viewing hers.
Blake Hodges.description: A young male voice with a neutral accent, grounded protagonist archetype, steady and pragmatic quality. Slightly nerdy and anxious.

Capper.ref_text: Who knows—maybe you will find what you're looking for? Maybe that's why all the creatures who go inside don't come back. If you return to share information with me, I may give back some of what you paid me.
Capper.generated_ref_text: Who knows—maybe you will find what you're looking for? Maybe that's why all the creatures who go inside don't come back. If you return to share information with me, I may give back some of what you paid me.
Capper.description: A mature masculine voice with a smooth, mid-range pitch, theatrical merchant archetype, enigmatic and slightly condescending quality. Rhythmic and dramatic cadence. Subtle sibilant texture suggesting feline elegance.

Discord.ref_text: At least a few of you still have choices left to make about where to live. If you value the way you used to be, you should stay on the other side of that Worldgate when you get there. Otherwise, your decision will be made for you.
Discord.generated_ref_text: At least a few of you still have choices left to make about where to live. If you value the way you used to be, you should stay on the other side of that Worldgate when you get there. Otherwise, your decision will be made for you.
Discord.description: An ageless masculine voice with a thin and reedy pitch, chaotic trickster archetype, mischievous and unpredictable quality. Erratic cadence with a light, airy, and ethereal vocal texture.

Galena.ref_text: We'll want to trim the sails as we come in towards the docks. We'll coast the rest of the way, and I'll fly across to tie us to the mooring. The navy will fly up to inspect us any moment. That's where you get to help.
Galena.generated_ref_text: We'll want to trim the sails as we come in towards the docks. We'll coast the rest of the way, and I'll fly across to tie us to the mooring. The navy will fly up to inspect us any moment. That's where you get to help.
Galena.description: A mature female voice with a low, weathered pitch, neutral accent, hardened survivor archetype, and a cynical, pragmatic quality. The cadence is blunt, clipped, and direct.

Hippogriff Leader.ref_text: I believe there's an outstanding bounty for this vessel's safe return to Equestria. How you distribute it is up to you. Is she carrying other stolen goods or contraband that you've seen?
Hippogriff Leader.generated_ref_text: I believe there's an outstanding bounty for this vessel's safe return to Equestria. How you distribute it is up to you. Is she carrying other stolen goods or contraband that you've seen?
Hippogriff Leader.description: A mature neutral voice with a deep, resonant pitch, unmarked accent, noble commander archetype, authoritative and fierce quality. Deliberate and measured cadence. Features a subtle, weathered rasp and powerful, breathy resonance.

Janet.ref_text: There's a chance he'll know something useful to us. If he doesn't, I won't keep us here burning daylight. Maybe plan to meet back at the ship at noon. If I don't turn up, it means there was more to it.
Janet.generated_ref_text: There's a chance he'll know something useful to us. If he doesn't, I won't keep us here burning daylight. Maybe plan to meet back at the ship at noon. If I don't turn up, it means there was more to it.
Janet.description: A young adult female voice with a bright, high-pitched timbre, light Spanish inflection, anxious survivor archetype, high-strung and emotionally volatile quality. Rapid, erratic cadence that fluctuates between manic excitement and heavy, deflated despair.

Jolie.ref_text: All of its down. Hell of a flight out there. Do you plan on sharing how you ended up all the way in Poland from Paris? Did you find some hidden dwarves to take you there on a mining train? Dwarves none of the search-parties or police could find...
Jolie.generated_ref_text: All of its down. Hell of a flight out there. Do you plan on sharing how you ended up all the way in Poland from Paris? Did you find some hidden dwarves to take you there on a mining train? Dwarves none of the search-parties or police could find...
Jolie.description: A mid-adult female voice with a sharp, clear pitch, neutral accent, pragmatic professional archetype, intense and no-nonsense quality. Direct and biting cadence. Possessing a grounded, slightly raspy texture.

Jordan.ref_text: There might not be a safe way home, Blake. I'm not sure what ninja-blender that portal took to my brain, but I'd rather not be bothered by it. I want this to be me on this side, and my human self to be me over there.
Jordan.generated_ref_text: There might not be a safe way home, Blake. I'm not sure what ninja-blender that portal took to my brain, but I'd rather not be bothered by it. I want this to be me on this side, and my human self to be me over there.
Jordan.description: A young adult masculine voice with a mid-range, textured pitch, neutral accent, pragmatic survivor archetype, grounded and resilient quality. Steady, matter-of-fact cadence. Subtle vocal grit suggesting physical weariness.

Kaelynn.ref_text: I want to go. I know it's probably not a good idea... traps and ruins or whatever. But we aren't trying to take anything. Maybe if this Ahuizotl is there, we can just tell him we're there to use the Worldgate and pass through without a fight.
Kaelynn.generated_ref_text: I want to go. I know it's probably not a good idea... traps and ruins or whatever. But we aren't trying to take anything. Maybe if this Ahuizotl is there, we can just tell him we're there to use the Worldgate and pass through without a fight.
Kaelynn.description: A young adult female voice with a grounded, medium-low pitch, neutral accent, capable survivor archetype, pragmatic and steady quality. Direct and concise cadence. Resonant, no-nonsense vocal texture.

Morningtide.ref_text: You're not even one of them. Have you been crawling around under a stone since the invasion, insect? I would like to know where to find the others, so I can extinguish them as well. You’ve threatened the good ponies of Canterlot one too many times.
Morningtide.generated_ref_text: You're not even one of them. Have you been crawling around under a stone since the invasion, insect? I would like to know where to find the others, so I can extinguish them as well. You’ve threatened the good ponies of Canterlot one too many times.
Morningtide.description: A mature female voice with a clear, resonant pitch, refined aristocratic accent, manipulative aristocrat archetype, composed and coldly calculating quality. Measured and deliberate cadence. Smooth, polished, and chillingly poised texture.

Novo.ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Novo.generated_ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Novo.description: A mature female voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal monarch archetype, authoritative and cautionary quality. Deliberate and steady pacing. Commandingly smooth with a weighty, grounded resonance.

Pale Light.ref_text: If you're friends with a hippogriff, they don't need your help. Every one of them gets a little piece of this... pearl. One of the most powerful enchantments in the world. They can use it to switch from sea to bird whenever they want.
Pale Light.generated_ref_text: If you're friends with a hippogriff, they don't need your help. Every one of them gets a little piece of this... pearl. One of the most powerful enchantments in the world. They can use it to switch from sea to bird whenever they want.
Pale Light.description: A mature male voice with a dry, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, weary scholar archetype, possessing a stoic and sardonic quality. Measured and blunt cadence. A subtle vocal texture of intellectual fatigue and matter-of-fact authority.

Pharynx.ref_text: I will see who of the swarm is in this hive. But you should know... this is not a promise to save your friend. I do not know what happened, and I don't know if we will be able to find her. But I promise we will try.
Pharynx.generated_ref_text: I will see who of the swarm is in this hive. But you should know... this is not a promise to save your friend. I do not know what happened, and I don't know if we will be able to find her. But I promise we will try.
Pharynx.description: A mature masculine voice with a deep, resonant timbre, formal and diplomatic, possessing a stoic yet profoundly empathetic quality. Measured, deliberate cadence. The delivery is authoritative and commanding, carrying a heavy weight of personal duty and composed strength.

Princess Luna.ref_text: Equestria has a long history of brave creatures doing what is right, even when it isn't wise. If it were up to me, I would not censure you. But you should understand... your faces are known now, to some of the most powerful families in the nation.
Princess Luna.generated_ref_text: Equestria has a long history of brave creatures doing what is right, even when it isn't wise. If it were up to me, I would not censure you. But you should understand... your faces are known now, to some of the most powerful families in the nation.
Princess Luna.description: A mature female voice with a deep, velvety resonance, neutral accent, regal and enigmatic archetype, calm and philosophical quality. Deliberate, measured pacing. An otherworldly presence with a commanding, weighted texture.

Queen Novo.ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Queen Novo.generated_ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Queen Novo.description: A mature female voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal monarch archetype, authoritative and cautionary quality. Deliberate and steady pacing. Commandingly smooth with a weighty, grounded resonance.

Red Sky.ref_text: If you want your questions approved, don't ask them about their dead relatives, I won't allow it. Don't ask them about leaving the tank either, as they're unable to do so yet. Do you understand?
Red Sky.generated_ref_text: If you want your questions approved, don't ask them about their dead relatives, I won't allow it. Don't ask them about leaving the tank either, as they're unable to do so yet. Do you understand?
Red Sky.description: A mature male voice with a dry, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, bureaucratic overseer archetype, possessing an annoyed and dismissive quality. Pacing is steady but prone to sharp, impatient bursts.

Rivulet.ref_text: A seapony in particular should be able to appreciate it. We have done much to make this cavern feel like home—but it is still a shelter, after all these years. The home our ancestors built is above. We are not native to these waters, as you are.
Rivulet.generated_ref_text: A seapony in particular should be able to appreciate it. We have done much to make this cavern feel like home—but it is still a shelter, after all these years. The home our ancestors built is above. We are not native to these waters, as you are.
Rivulet.description: A mature male voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, seasoned naval officer archetype, possessing a stoic and professional quality with underlying weary sentimentality. Measured and deliberate cadence. Features an authoritative, weathered texture.

Rose.ref_text: I understand better than most. I've been with Spark for over a year now. He wasn't very social for most of that time, but I still picked up all kinds of things.
Rose.generated_ref_text: I understand better than most. I've been with Spark for over a year now. He wasn't very social for most of that time, but I still picked up all kinds of things.
Rose.description: A young adult female voice with a fluid, textured timbre, neutral accent, elemental adventurer archetype, serene yet resilient quality. Pacing is rhythmic and deliberate, mirroring natural shifts in motion and temperature. Subtle breathiness provides a sense of frost-edged clarity and sun-warmed resonance.

Rotala.ref_text: Of course, miss. Wasn't that way for my parents, mind. But birds these days couldn't get along without it. Now come with me, we'll rinse that seawater off and get you back to your friends before the hour's up.
Rotala.generated_ref_text: Of course, miss. Wasn't that way for my parents, mind. But birds these days couldn't get along without it. Now come with me, we'll rinse that seawater off and get you back to your friends before the hour's up.
Rotala.description: A young adult feminine voice with a smooth, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, poised attendant archetype, possessing a calm, placid, and professional quality. Her cadence is measured and steady, carrying an air of polite composure and subtle, enigmatic stillness.

Ryan.ref_text: But I guess you deserve to know. I'm pretty sure I'm like Deanna Troi. I know how you're feeling without even looking at you. No, I'm not going to prove it Blake, I know you don't believe me.
Ryan.generated_ref_text: But I guess you deserve to know. I'm pretty sure I'm like Deanna Troi. I know how you're feeling without even looking at you. No, I'm not going to prove it Blake, I know you don't believe me.
Ryan.description: A young adult male voice with a mid-range, dry timbre, neutral accent, cynical pessimist archetype, gloomy and irritable quality. Slow, muttered cadence punctuated by sharp bursts of frustration. An underlying unsettling or uncanny resonance.

She.ref_text: Those of us who were separated from the hive all developed our own way. Maybe you know—it's easy to conform to expectations. It is harder to know what you should be when no creature is there to make such demands.
She.generated_ref_text: Those of us who were separated from the hive all developed our own way. Maybe you know—it's easy to conform to expectations. It is harder to know what you should be when no creature is there to make such demands.
She.description: A young adult female voice with a grounded mid-range pitch, neutral accent, stoic survivor archetype, and a pragmatic, observant quality. Measured and economical cadence with a steady, resilient resonance.

Skystar.ref_text: Did you really sing so well a whole crew of pirates flung themselves overboard? Were you in Acampus? Why were you riding around on the surface in the first place? Which is better, kelp or seaweed?
Skystar.generated_ref_text: Did you really sing so well a whole crew of pirates flung themselves overboard? Were you in Acampus? Why were you riding around on the surface in the first place? Which is better, kelp or seaweed?
Skystar.description: A young adult feminine voice with a bright, high-pitched timbre, neutral accent, bubbly and overeager archetype, energetic and restless quality. Rapid, erratic, and impulsive cadence.

Tellin.ref_text: We're the last of our kind in the whole world. Morningtide gave us a place to hide, where we could make more creatures like us. Don't you care if we die out? Do you wanna be the last seaponies to ever swim?
Tellin.generated_ref_text: We're the last of our kind in the whole world. Morningtide gave us a place to hide, where we could make more creatures like us. Don't you care if we die out? Do you wanna be the last seaponies to ever swim?
Tellin.description: A [30s] [masculine-leaning neutral] voice with [a gritty, low-pitched rasp], [no discernible accent; colloquial], [weary survivor archetype], [cynical and grounded] quality. [Steady, pragmatic cadence]. [Weathered and resonant texture].

The Old Mare.ref_text: You made the transition from fresh water to salt water. Notice your body has become longer, smoother. You've lost the spots. I wonder if they'd be in the same pattern if we transitioned you back... but that's an experiment for another day.
The Old Mare.generated_ref_text: You made the transition from fresh water to salt water. Notice your body has become longer, smoother. You've lost the spots. I wonder if they'd be in the same pattern if we transitioned you back... but that's an experiment for another day.
The Old Mare.description: An elderly female voice with a low, dry pitch, neutral accent, clinical observer archetype, possessing a stoic and world-weary quality. The pacing is slow, measured, and unflappable, with a detached and unimpressed vocal texture.

The Pegasus.ref_text: You are going to stay right here. We put out a message to Echo Caverns. We're going to find which clan you're from. You better hope they can pay the wergild.
The Pegasus.generated_ref_text: You are going to stay right here. We put out a message to Echo Caverns. We're going to find which clan you're from. You better hope they can pay the wergild.
The Pegasus.description: A mature male voice with a low, raspy pitch, accentless, imposing warrior archetype, menacing and authoritative quality. Slow, deliberate cadence. Notable sandpaper-like grit and gravelly resonance.

The Princess.ref_text: The seaponies, extinct? I'm afraid that theory is mistaken—they live, in their millions. I do not know where, yet they dream in peace, so it must be comfortable enough.
The Princess.generated_ref_text: The seaponies, extinct? I'm afraid that theory is mistaken—they live, in their millions. I do not know where, yet they dream in peace, so it must be comfortable enough.
The Princess.description: A mature female voice with a resonant, velvety mid-range pitch, neutral accent, regal mentor archetype, possessing a calm, wise, and warm quality. Deliberate and poised cadence with an ethereal, observant texture.

The Unicorn.ref_text: I know you may resent me now, but understand that I do this for your own good. I cannot allow something rare and beautiful to die out. I must preserve you, for the sake of the others like you who are not yet born.
The Unicorn.generated_ref_text: I know you may resent me now, but understand that I do this for your own good. I cannot allow something rare and beautiful to die out. I must preserve you, for the sake of the others like you who are not yet born.
The Unicorn.description: A mature female voice with a refined and slightly brittle timbre, neutral accent, scholarly aristocrat archetype, poised and subtly dismissive quality. Measured and deliberate cadence. Articulate and commanding resonance.

Torrent.ref_text: Every detail you know is precious, and there's some chance the queen will want to meet with you. I'm afraid it would be impossible to refuse if that happens.
Torrent.generated_ref_text: Every detail you know is precious, and there's some chance the queen will want to meet with you. I'm afraid it would be impossible to refuse if that happens.
Torrent.description: A mature male voice with a clear, authoritative pitch, neutral accent, disciplined military officer archetype, conveying an efficient and vigilant quality. Precise, clipped cadence with a sharp, resonant texture.

Twilight Sparkle.ref_text: You know what, fine. That's a good idea. I'm rethinking your community service, creatures. If there are any days left unused when this is over, I'll still send you where I was thinking. But there's something more important for us to do right now.
Twilight Sparkle.generated_ref_text: You know what, fine. That's a good idea. I'm rethinking your community service, creatures. If there are any days left unused when this is over, I'll still send you where I was thinking. But there's something more important for us to do right now.
Twilight Sparkle.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal sovereign archetype, and a composed, authoritative quality. Measured, deliberate pacing. Polished and dignified resonance.

Vanilla Sky.ref_text: Griffons are proud creatures, they can't help it. As long as they think they can catch you, those birds will be watching. I know exactly how the next two days will go—my captain will order a swift advance to the border, and we'll drive them off.
Vanilla Sky.generated_ref_text: Griffons are proud creatures, they can't help it. As long as they think they can catch you, those birds will be watching. I know exactly how the next two days will go—my captain will order a swift advance to the border, and we'll drive them off.
Vanilla Sky.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, bright pitch, neutral accent, earnest inspector archetype, possessing a polite and observant quality. Pacing is methodical during official duties but shifts to an inquisitive, conversational cadence. Light and energetic vocal texture.

Vesper.ref_text: Did I do something bad by talking to the princess? I told her the truth—that I wandered in by mistake, wasn't from Equestria. That we were just trying to find a way home. She said she'd find me, and help if she could.
Vesper.generated_ref_text: Did I do something bad by talking to the princess? I told her the truth—that I wandered in by mistake, wasn't from Equestria. That we were just trying to find a way home. She said she'd find me, and help if she could.
Vesper.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, warm mid-range pitch, neutral accent, seeker archetype, thoughtful and inquisitive quality. Pacing is fluid, alternating between reflective contemplation and reactive determination. Resonant with an earnest, observant undertone.

Aerial.ref_text: You will not be able to go to the authorities for help, since you will have no witness to testify. It will be for you to affect a rescue, risking the wrath of an old and wealthy family, and possible arrest at the hooves of Equestrian authorities.

Novo.ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Novo.generated_ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Novo.description: A mature female voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal monarch archetype, authoritative and cautionary quality. Deliberate and steady pacing. Commandingly smooth with a weighty, grounded resonance.

Pale Light.ref_text: If you're friends with a hippogriff, they don't need your help. Every one of them gets a little piece of this... pearl. One of the most powerful enchantments in the world. They can use it to switch from sea to bird whenever they want.
Pale Light.generated_ref_text: If you're friends with a hippogriff, they don't need your help. Every one of them gets a little piece of this... pearl. One of the most powerful enchantments in the world. They can use it to switch from sea to bird whenever they want.
Pale Light.description: A mature male voice with a dry, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, weary scholar archetype, possessing a stoic and sardonic quality. Measured and blunt cadence. A subtle vocal texture of intellectual fatigue and matter-of-fact authority.

Pharynx.ref_text: I will see who of the swarm is in this hive. But you should know... this is not a promise to save your friend. I do not know what happened, and I don't know if we will be able to find her. But I promise we will try.
Pharynx.generated_ref_text: I will see who of the swarm is in this hive. But you should know... this is not a promise to save your friend. I do not know what happened, and I don't know if we will be able to find her. But I promise we will try.
Pharynx.description: A mature masculine voice with a deep, resonant timbre, formal and diplomatic, possessing a stoic yet profoundly empathetic quality. Measured, deliberate cadence. The delivery is authoritative and commanding, carrying a heavy weight of personal duty and composed strength.

Princess Luna.ref_text: Equestria has a long history of brave creatures doing what is right, even when it isn't wise. If it were up to me, I would not censure you. But you should understand... your faces are known now, to some of the most powerful families in the nation.
Princess Luna.generated_ref_text: Equestria has a long history of brave creatures doing what is right, even when it isn't wise. If it were up to me, I would not censure you. But you should understand... your faces are known now, to some of the most powerful families in the nation.
Princess Luna.description: A mature female voice with a deep, velvety resonance, neutral accent, regal and enigmatic archetype, calm and philosophical quality. Deliberate, measured pacing. An otherworldly presence with a commanding, weighted texture.

Queen Novo.ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Queen Novo.generated_ref_text: When the Storm King was finally defeated, and we reopened ourselves to the world above, I did hope we would learn what had become of our friends below the waves. I hope a messenger like you came with good news.
Queen Novo.description: A mature female voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal monarch archetype, authoritative and cautionary quality. Deliberate and steady pacing. Commandingly smooth with a weighty, grounded resonance.

Red Sky.ref_text: If you want your questions approved, don't ask them about their dead relatives, I won't allow it. Don't ask them about leaving the tank either, as they're unable to do so yet. Do you understand?
Red Sky.generated_ref_text: If you want your questions approved, don't ask them about their dead relatives, I won't allow it. Don't ask them about leaving the tank either, as they're unable to do so yet. Do you understand?
Red Sky.description: A mature male voice with a dry, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, bureaucratic overseer archetype, possessing an annoyed and dismissive quality. Pacing is steady but prone to sharp, impatient bursts.

Rivulet.ref_text: A seapony in particular should be able to appreciate it. We have done much to make this cavern feel like home—but it is still a shelter, after all these years. The home our ancestors built is above. We are not native to these waters, as you are.
Rivulet.generated_ref_text: A seapony in particular should be able to appreciate it. We have done much to make this cavern feel like home—but it is still a shelter, after all these years. The home our ancestors built is above. We are not native to these waters, as you are.
Rivulet.description: A mature male voice with a deep, resonant pitch, neutral accent, seasoned naval officer archetype, possessing a stoic and professional quality with underlying weary sentimentality. Measured and deliberate cadence. Features an authoritative, weathered texture.

Rose.ref_text: I understand better than most. I've been with Spark for over a year now. He wasn't very social for most of that time, but I still picked up all kinds of things.
Rose.generated_ref_text: I understand better than most. I've been with Spark for over a year now. He wasn't very social for most of that time, but I still picked up all kinds of things.
Rose.description: A young adult female voice with a fluid, textured timbre, neutral accent, elemental adventurer archetype, serene yet resilient quality. Pacing is rhythmic and deliberate, mirroring natural shifts in motion and temperature. Subtle breathiness provides a sense of frost-edged clarity and sun-warmed resonance.

Rotala.ref_text: Of course, miss. Wasn't that way for my parents, mind. But birds these days couldn't get along without it. Now come with me, we'll rinse that seawater off and get you back to your friends before the hour's up.
Rotala.generated_ref_text: Of course, miss. Wasn't that way for my parents, mind. But birds these days couldn't get along without it. Now come with me, we'll rinse that seawater off and get you back to your friends before the hour's up.
Rotala.description: A young adult feminine voice with a smooth, mid-range pitch, neutral accent, poised attendant archetype, possessing a calm, placid, and professional quality. Her cadence is measured and steady, carrying an air of polite composure and subtle, enigmatic stillness.

Ryan.ref_text: But I guess you deserve to know. I'm pretty sure I'm like Deanna Troi. I know how you're feeling without even looking at you. No, I'm not going to prove it Blake, I know you don't believe me.
Ryan.generated_ref_text: But I guess you deserve to know. I'm pretty sure I'm like Deanna Troi. I know how you're feeling without even looking at you. No, I'm not going to prove it Blake, I know you don't believe me.
Ryan.description: A young adult male voice with a mid-range, dry timbre, neutral accent, cynical pessimist archetype, gloomy and irritable quality. Slow, muttered cadence punctuated by sharp bursts of frustration. An underlying unsettling or uncanny resonance.

She.ref_text: Those of us who were separated from the hive all developed our own way. Maybe you know—it's easy to conform to expectations. It is harder to know what you should be when no creature is there to make such demands.
She.generated_ref_text: Those of us who were separated from the hive all developed our own way. Maybe you know—it's easy to conform to expectations. It is harder to know what you should be when no creature is there to make such demands.
She.description: A young adult female voice with a grounded mid-range pitch, neutral accent, stoic survivor archetype, and a pragmatic, observant quality. Measured and economical cadence with a steady, resilient resonance.

Skystar.ref_text: Did you really sing so well a whole crew of pirates flung themselves overboard? Were you in Acampus? Why were you riding around on the surface in the first place? Which is better, kelp or seaweed?
Skystar.generated_ref_text: Did you really sing so well a whole crew of pirates flung themselves overboard? Were you in Acampus? Why were you riding around on the surface in the first place? Which is better, kelp or seaweed?
Skystar.description: A young adult feminine voice with a bright, high-pitched timbre, neutral accent, bubbly and overeager archetype, energetic and restless quality. Rapid, erratic, and impulsive cadence.

Tellin.ref_text: We're the last of our kind in the whole world. Morningtide gave us a place to hide, where we could make more creatures like us. Don't you care if we die out? Do you wanna be the last seaponies to ever swim?
Tellin.generated_ref_text: We're the last of our kind in the whole world. Morningtide gave us a place to hide, where we could make more creatures like us. Don't you care if we die out? Do you wanna be the last seaponies to ever swim?
Tellin.description: A [30s] [masculine-leaning neutral] voice with [a gritty, low-pitched rasp], [no discernible accent; colloquial], [weary survivor archetype], [cynical and grounded] quality. [Steady, pragmatic cadence]. [Weathered and resonant texture].

The Old Mare.ref_text: You made the transition from fresh water to salt water. Notice your body has become longer, smoother. You've lost the spots. I wonder if they'd be in the same pattern if we transitioned you back... but that's an experiment for another day.
The Old Mare.generated_ref_text: You made the transition from fresh water to salt water. Notice your body has become longer, smoother. You've lost the spots. I wonder if they'd be in the same pattern if we transitioned you back... but that's an experiment for another day.
The Old Mare.description: An elderly female voice with a low, dry pitch, neutral accent, clinical observer archetype, possessing a stoic and world-weary quality. The pacing is slow, measured, and unflappable, with a detached and unimpressed vocal texture.

The Pegasus.ref_text: You are going to stay right here. We put out a message to Echo Caverns. We're going to find which clan you're from. You better hope they can pay the wergild.
The Pegasus.generated_ref_text: You are going to stay right here. We put out a message to Echo Caverns. We're going to find which clan you're from. You better hope they can pay the wergild.
The Pegasus.description: A mature male voice with a low, raspy pitch, accentless, imposing warrior archetype, menacing and authoritative quality. Slow, deliberate cadence. Notable sandpaper-like grit and gravelly resonance.

The Princess.ref_text: The seaponies, extinct? I'm afraid that theory is mistaken—they live, in their millions. I do not know where, yet they dream in peace, so it must be comfortable enough.
The Princess.generated_ref_text: The seaponies, extinct? I'm afraid that theory is mistaken—they live, in their millions. I do not know where, yet they dream in peace, so it must be comfortable enough.
The Princess.description: A mature female voice with a resonant, velvety mid-range pitch, neutral accent, regal mentor archetype, possessing a calm, wise, and warm quality. Deliberate and poised cadence with an ethereal, observant texture.

The Unicorn.ref_text: I know you may resent me now, but understand that I do this for your own good. I cannot allow something rare and beautiful to die out. I must preserve you, for the sake of the others like you who are not yet born.
The Unicorn.generated_ref_text: I know you may resent me now, but understand that I do this for your own good. I cannot allow something rare and beautiful to die out. I must preserve you, for the sake of the others like you who are not yet born.
The Unicorn.description: A mature female voice with a refined and slightly brittle timbre, neutral accent, scholarly aristocrat archetype, poised and subtly dismissive quality. Measured and deliberate cadence. Articulate and commanding resonance.

Torrent.ref_text: Every detail you know is precious, and there's some chance the queen will want to meet with you. I'm afraid it would be impossible to refuse if that happens.
Torrent.generated_ref_text: Every detail you know is precious, and there's some chance the queen will want to meet with you. I'm afraid it would be impossible to refuse if that happens.
Torrent.description: A mature male voice with a clear, authoritative pitch, neutral accent, disciplined military officer archetype, conveying an efficient and vigilant quality. Precise, clipped cadence with a sharp, resonant texture.

Twilight Sparkle.ref_text: You know what, fine. That's a good idea. I'm rethinking your community service, creatures. If there are any days left unused when this is over, I'll still send you where I was thinking. But there's something more important for us to do right now.
Twilight Sparkle.generated_ref_text: You know what, fine. That's a good idea. I'm rethinking your community service, creatures. If there are any days left unused when this is over, I'll still send you where I was thinking. But there's something more important for us to do right now.
Twilight Sparkle.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, resonant pitch, neutral accent, regal sovereign archetype, and a composed, authoritative quality. Measured, deliberate pacing. Polished and dignified resonance.

Vanilla Sky.ref_text: Griffons are proud creatures, they can't help it. As long as they think they can catch you, those birds will be watching. I know exactly how the next two days will go—my captain will order a swift advance to the border, and we'll drive them off.
Vanilla Sky.generated_ref_text: Griffons are proud creatures, they can't help it. As long as they think they can catch you, those birds will be watching. I know exactly how the next two days will go—my captain will order a swift advance to the border, and we'll drive them off.
Vanilla Sky.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, bright pitch, neutral accent, earnest inspector archetype, possessing a polite and observant quality. Pacing is methodical during official duties but shifts to an inquisitive, conversational cadence. Light and energetic vocal texture.

Vesper.ref_text: Did I do something bad by talking to the princess? I told her the truth—that I wandered in by mistake, wasn't from Equestria. That we were just trying to find a way home. She said she'd find me, and help if she could.
Vesper.generated_ref_text: Did I do something bad by talking to the princess? I told her the truth—that I wandered in by mistake, wasn't from Equestria. That we were just trying to find a way home. She said she'd find me, and help if she could.
Vesper.description: A young adult female voice with a clear, warm mid-range pitch, neutral accent, seeker archetype, thoughtful and inquisitive quality. Pacing is fluid, alternating between reflective contemplation and reactive determination. Resonant with an earnest, observant undertone.
